02353|   const batchRevokeApprovals = async () => {
02354|     if (!address || !revokeChain || selectedApprovals.size === 0) return
02355|     setIsRevoking(true)
02356|     try {
02357|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {

02359|         await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))

02364|       const selectedApprovalsArray = Array.from(selectedApprovals).map(idx => approvals[idx])
02365|       let successCount = 0
02366|       let failCount = 0
02367| 
02368|       for (let i = 0; i < selectedApprovalsArray.length; i++) {
02369|         const approval = selectedApprovalsArray[i]
02370|         try {
02371|           toast.info(`Revoking ${i + 1}/${selectedApprovalsArray.length}: ${approval.token.symbol}...`)
02372|           const hash = await sendTx(wagmiConfig, {

02375|           })
02376|           // Wait for on-chain confirmation before moving to next
02377|           await waitForTransactionReceipt(wagmiConfig, { hash })
02378|           successCount++
02379|           console.log(`Revoked ${approval.token.symbol}:`, hash)
02380|         } catch (error) {
02381|           const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message.toLowerCase() : ''
02382|           if (msg.includes('user rejected') || msg.includes('user denied')) {
02383|             toast.error('Revoke cancelled')
02384|             break
02385|           }
02386|           console.error(`Failed to revoke ${approval.token.symbol}:`, error)
02387|           failCount++

02389|       }
02390|

02392|       if (failCount > 0) toast.error(`Failed to revoke ${failCount} approval${failCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
02393| 
02394|       setSelectedApprovals(new Set())
